rationale: Stage-1 foundation lands cleanly: `Resolve` + `CLIOverrides` defined, all five required `Clone` methods (AgentConfig, RoutingConfig, EvidenceCapsConfig, ExecutionsMirrorConfig, WorkersConfig) present and explicitly invoked from `Resolve`, nil-receiver path returns sealed defaults without panic, and deep-copy is verified by both source→clone and clone→source mutation assertions. Scope discipline respected (no LoadAndResolve, no new resolvers).
